automated-testing.name: Pytest Patterns
automated-testing.description: Comprehensive pytest skill covering modern patterns for Python test automation including fixtures, parametrize, async testing, mocking, coverage strategies, integration tests, and conftest organisation for pytest 7.0+ projects.
automated-testing.title: The Quality Guardian

test-driven-development.name: Test-Driven Development
test-driven-development.description: Forces the AI agent to follow a strict red-green-refactor TDD workflow — writing failing tests before any implementation code, blocking code generation that skips the test step, and enforcing coverage thresholds before completing a task.
test-driven-development.title: The Red-Green Oath

test-driven-development.name: TDD
test-driven-development.description: Enforces strict vertical-slice TDD — one test then one implementation at a time — explicitly blocking horizontal slicing (all tests first, then all code). Tests verify behaviour through public interfaces only; mocking internal collaborators is treated as an anti-pattern.
test-driven-development.title: Vertical-Slice TDD

document-editing.name: PPTX Editor
document-editing.description: Extracts slide content from PowerPoint (.pptx) files using markitdown, applies edits or design principles in-place, and repacks the file — enabling agents to read, modify, and write structured presentation files without a GUI.
document-editing.title: The Slide Artisan

document-editing.name: Edit Article
document-editing.description: Edits articles by first sectioning them as a DAG of information dependencies, confirming the section order, then rewriting each section for clarity and flow with a 240-character-per-paragraph constraint.
document-editing.title: The Section-by-Section Rewrite

tool-creation.name: Skill Creator
tool-creation.description: Interviews the user through a structured dialogue to elicit the skill's purpose, trigger conditions, and step-by-step instructions, then programmatically writes a new SKILL.md file ready for use in a Claude Code or Codex CLI skills directory.
tool-creation.title: The Skill Forger's Art

tool-creation.name: Write a Skill
tool-creation.description: Guides creation of new agent skills through a structured requirements interview, then produces a SKILL.md with a trigger-aware description, progressive-disclosure layout, and optional bundled scripts or reference files — ready for installation in any Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex CLI skills directory.
tool-creation.title: The Skill Scaffolder

autonomous-debug.name: Autonomous SWE
autonomous-debug.description: Autonomous software engineering agent capable of end-to-end debugging, code generation, and self-correction across complex multi-file codebases.
autonomous-debug.title: The Codebreaker's Will

autonomous-debug.name: Diagnose
autonomous-debug.description: Drives a rigorous five-phase debugging discipline — build a feedback loop, minimise, hypothesise, instrument, fix and regression-test — refusing to proceed until a fast deterministic pass/fail signal exists. Applies to hard bugs and performance regressions.
autonomous-debug.title: The Disciplined Diagnosis Loop

write-report.name: README Generator
write-report.description: Analyzes a project's directory structure, dependency manifests, and configuration files to generate a professional README.md covering installation, usage, API reference, and contributing guidelines.
write-report.title: The Document Weaver

write-report.name: REST API README Generator
write-report.description: Scans a Java Spring project for controller annotations, extracts REST API endpoint definitions, and automatically generates structured API documentation in README format.
write-report.title: The Endpoint Scribe

browser-automation.name: Notte Browser
browser-automation.description: AI-first browser automation using the Notte Browser API to control browser sessions, scrape pages, fill forms, take screenshots, and run autonomous web agents with managed credential handling.
browser-automation.title: The Digital Navigator

api-call.name: HF CLI
api-call.description: Guides Hugging Face Hub CLI operations for downloading, uploading, managing repos, running Jobs, querying datasets, configuring Spaces, and handling Hub authentication.
api-call.title: The Hub Operator

data-analysis.name: Hugging Face Datasets
data-analysis.description: Explores Hugging Face datasets through the Dataset Viewer API, resolving configs and splits, previewing rows, paginating records, searching text, filtering rows, and retrieving parquet metadata.
data-analysis.title: The Dataset Cartographer

fine-tune.name: Hugging Face LLM Trainer
fine-tune.description: Runs LLM fine-tuning on Hugging Face Jobs using TRL or Unsloth, covering SFT, DPO, GRPO, reward modeling, dataset validation, hardware selection, Trackio monitoring, and Hub persistence.
fine-tune.title: The Cloud Fine-Tuner

literature-review.name: Hugging Face Papers
literature-review.description: Looks up Hugging Face paper pages and arXiv IDs, fetching markdown paper content and structured metadata such as authors, linked models, datasets, Spaces, GitHub repos, and project pages.
literature-review.title: The Paper Indexer

object-detection.name: Hugging Face Vision Trainer
object-detection.description: Trains and fine-tunes object detection, image classification, and SAM/SAM2 segmentation models on Hugging Face Jobs or locally with dataset validation, metrics, Trackio, and Hub persistence.
object-detection.title: The Vision Forge

multimodal-reasoning.name: Transformers.js
multimodal-reasoning.description: Runs Hugging Face Transformers.js models directly in JavaScript and TypeScript across browser and server runtimes for NLP, vision, audio, and multimodal inference with WebGPU or WASM.
multimodal-reasoning.title: The Browser Modelwright

autonomous-research-agent.name: AutoResearch
autonomous-research-agent.description: Autonomous research agent that iteratively searches, reads, and synthesizes academic papers into structured summaries.
autonomous-research-agent.title: The Scholar's Compass

framework-upgrade.name: Upgrade Laravel v13
framework-upgrade.description: Guides an AI agent through upgrading a Laravel 12 application to Laravel 13 safely, covering breaking changes, dependency updates, config migrations, and post-upgrade test validation.
framework-upgrade.title: The Versionist's Trial

ux-audit.name: Nielsen Heuristics Audit
ux-audit.description: Audits a UI interface against Jakob Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics step-by-step, scoring each heuristic, surfacing violations, and producing a prioritized remediation report.
ux-audit.title: The Ten Laws of Sight

design-review.name: Grill Me
design-review.description: Conducts a relentless one-question-at-a-time interview about a plan or design, walking every branch of the decision tree with a recommended answer per question, resolving dependencies in order, and substituting codebase exploration wherever a question can be answered empirically.
design-review.title: The Relentless Interviewer

design-review.name: Grill With Docs
design-review.description: Stress-tests a plan against the project's domain model by relentlessly questioning each design decision one at a time, surfacing language conflicts with CONTEXT.md, cross-referencing code contradictions, and crystallising decisions as inline CONTEXT.md updates and ADRs as they are resolved.
design-review.title: The Domain-Aware Interrogator

refactor-code.name: Improve Codebase Architecture
refactor-code.description: Identifies architectural deepening opportunities in a codebase — shallow modules with high interface-to-implementation ratios — using domain-glossary vocabulary and the deletion test, then grills the developer on the chosen candidate to design a deep-module replacement with better locality and testability.
refactor-code.title: The Depth Seeker

vertical-slice-planning.name: To Issues
vertical-slice-planning.description: Breaks a plan, spec, or PRD into independently-grabbable GitHub issues as tracer-bullet vertical slices that each cut through all integration layers end-to-end. Classifies each slice HITL or AFK, maps dependency chains, quizzes the user on granularity, and publishes structured issues with acceptance criteria in dependency order.
vertical-slice-planning.title: The Vertical Slicer

prd-generation.name: To PRD
prd-generation.description: Synthesises the current conversation context and codebase knowledge into a fully-structured PRD — problem statement, extensive numbered user stories, implementation decisions (modules, interfaces, schema), testing decisions, and out-of-scope items — then publishes it to the project issue tracker.
prd-generation.title: The PRD Synthesiser

issue-triage.name: Triage
issue-triage.description: Moves GitHub issues through a two-category (bug/enhancement) × five-state (needs-triage/needs-info/ready-for-agent/ready-for-human/wontfix) state machine. Reproduces bugs from issue steps, runs a domain-aware grilling session when needed, writes structured agent briefs, and appends AI-generated triage notes with the required disclaimer.
issue-triage.title: The State-Machine Triager

code-explain.name: Zoom Out
code-explain.description: Signals the agent to ascend one layer of abstraction and produce a map of all relevant modules, callers, and domain-glossary terms in the unfamiliar code area, without explaining implementation details.
code-explain.title: The Abstraction Lift

multi-agent-orchestration-v.name: Flow Nexus Swarm
multi-agent-orchestration-v.description: Cloud-based AI swarm orchestration platform supporting hierarchical, mesh, ring, and star topologies with event-driven workflows, message queue processing, and intelligent agent assignment.
multi-agent-orchestration-v.title: The Grand Conductor's Blueprint

generate-test.name: Unittest Generator
generate-test.description: Autonomous Claude agent that generates comprehensive unittest.TestCase suites from source code, organising tests into concept-based subfolders under a tests/ directory with proper imports, fixtures, and edge-case coverage.
generate-test.title: The Test Weaver

skill-discovery.name: Find Skills
skill-discovery.description: Searches the skills.sh registry by keyword or category, queries install counts to surface popular skills, and auto-installs the selected skill into the current project's skills directory.
skill-discovery.title: The Registry Scout

rag-pipeline.name: OrchestrKit RAG
rag-pipeline.description: Production-grade RAG retrieval skill covering 30+ patterns including core pipeline composition, HyDE query expansion, pgvector hybrid search, cross-encoder reranking, multimodal chunking, and agentic self-RAG and corrective-RAG loops.
rag-pipeline.title: The Knowledge Architect

awaitingClassification.name: Gaia Triage (Internal)
awaitingClassification.description: Automates repository triage for the Gaia Skill Tree, including fixing documentation drift, managing build dependencies (build, setuptools, wheel), and synchronizing generated graph projections and GEXF exports.

awaitingClassification.name: Repo Docs Before PR
awaitingClassification.description: Builds and validates repository documentation as a pre-PR guardrail by reminding contributors to run the local docs drift check, then surfaces actionable regeneration commands so pull requests do not fail CI on documentation freshness.

awaitingClassification.name: Database Engineer
awaitingClassification.description: Schema design and query optimization expert across relational, NoSQL, graph, time-series, and data warehouse stores with sub-second response targets.

awaitingClassification.name: DevOps Engineer
awaitingClassification.description: CI/CD pipeline design and deployment automation specialist — build systems, artifact publishing, environment promotion, and rollback strategies.

awaitingClassification.name: MCP Client
awaitingClassification.description: Portable CLI tool that connects to MCP servers on-demand, enumerates available tools, displays them, and executes calls — works with any MCP-compatible backend without platform lock-in.

awaitingClassification.name: Parallel Execution
awaitingClassification.description: Manages concurrent work item execution with independence verification, queue-based state tracking, and configurable concurrency limits (default 5).

awaitingClassification.name: Release
awaitingClassification.description: Automates the full release cycle — semantic version bump, CHANGELOG update, PR merge, git tag, and GitHub release creation with multiple verification gates.

awaitingClassification.name: Requirements Engineer
awaitingClassification.description: Business analysis specialist bridging stakeholders and technical teams — requirements gathering, user story writing, acceptance criteria, and full requirements lifecycle management.

awaitingClassification.name: Security Engineer
awaitingClassification.description: Security architecture specialist — vulnerability assessment, zero-trust design, compliance management, and incident response with severity-classified remediation guidance.

awaitingClassification.name: User Tester
awaitingClassification.description: E2E testing specialist with Puppeteer/Playwright automation — cross-browser validation, full user journey simulation, and visual regression detection.
